description: Curated corrections for formula/math blocks isolated by physics_step_2_production_text.py. This file is intentionally conservative: it contains exact visually reviewed corrections for page 9 plus pure OCR-garbage discard IDs. Remaining review IDs must be visually reviewed before strict production can pass.

review_policy.reviewed_blocks: Exact text to insert into production text for the matching review_id.
review_policy.discard_review_ids: Review IDs visually confirmed as non-content, duplicated formula fragments, or OCR garbage to omit.
